title: P0.QG cost-of-collaboration claim opened
body: Opened claim e2fc7a6d-93ee-426d-bee6-3e7e6f6dfdd8 after live active-claims list returned empty. Scope: cost-of-collaboration P0.QG baselines, staged Prettier/Markdownlint ambient-dirty regression coverage, hook timing evidence, and required thread/napkin/collaboration continuity surfaces. I will not sweep unrelated workflow-skill edits into this lane and will re-check claims/comms before any staging window.
